$comment: SHA-256 hashes of self-hosted OFL fonts. Update via `node apps/ui/scripts/font-integrity-update.mjs` after vendoring. Runtime SHA-256 verifier (font-integrity.ts) lands in v0.1.x; until then these hashes serve as a static integrity reference + audit trail. v0.1.0 ships Newsreader vendored + Public Sans / Commit Mono on the CSS fallback chain — see apps/ui/public/fonts/README.md.
$note: Null sha256 = pending vendor. v0.1.0 vendors Newsreader only; Public Sans + Commit Mono use the CSS fallback chain (Public Sans → system-ui; Commit Mono → JetBrains Mono / Menlo) until v0.1.x converts the upstream variable TTF / OTF assets to WOFF2. Run `node apps/ui/scripts/font-integrity-update.mjs` after each vendor change to recompute hashes.
